package.name: can_fault_monitor
package.description: Fault injection and recovery latency benchmarking for CAN bus robot systems. Implements NODE_DROPOUT, FRAME_CORRUPTION, and BUS_FLOOD fault modes over Linux SocketCAN (vcan0), with per-fault detection and recovery latency measurement. Architecture and detection logic are portable to physical CAN hardware with zero code changes (see docs/failure_modes.md — Hardware Delta).
